title: BetterVanillaBuilding
description: The BetterVanillaBuilding pack contains new textures for a large range of default Minecraft blocks and items.
body:
## BetterVanillaBuilding

### Made by StefanJ2\_

Download from the [official website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/)

## What to expect

The BetterVanillaBuilding pack contains new textures for a large range of default Minecraft blocks and items.

In **past editions** BetterVanillaBuilding included the ability to make **custom armors, tools, items and blocks**. These features have been moved out of the main resourcepack and have been moved into their own spinoff versions. Find all features you want on the [BetterVanillaBuilding website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com/).

## Made possible by community support

Choose a way to share your appreciation for the work with the options below:
